betzler.title: Betzler
betzler.subtitle: Migration of Sales Operations to Business Central

emma.quote: “AILO is an amazing team with high energy and badass skills. From the first day they felt as part of the team, and where very energetic and creative in solving our problems. Every workshop was carefully planned, and they made it easy to decide to keep them aboard. I'll recommend the team to anyone.”
emma.name: Emma Arfelt, CTO

oliver.quote: “I samarbejde med Ailo-teamet udviklede vi et KPI-system med fokus på at skabe et fælles sprog mellem front og køkken. Gennem hele processen oplevede vi Ailo som yderst professionelle og meget behagelige at arbejde sammen med. Det endelige system blev skarpt og gennemtænkt. En klar anbefaling herfra ”
oliver.name: Oliver Kaae Mogensen, COO

anna.quote: “AILO managed to translate complex data into concrete recommendations that the entire team could act on…”
anna.name: Anna Nielsen
